body.title: Fix slow Postgres queries — wg_word_docs JOIN 400ms, memory IN-clause 200ms
body.result: Added covering index idx_wgd_word_cover on wg_word_docs(word) INCLUDE (doc_id, weight). Scoring query: 400ms → 6ms. ANALYZE run.
body.description: wg_word_docs scoring query with 100+ doc_ids IN clause: 400ms. Memory batch fetch with 100+ ids: 200ms. Need composite indexes on wg_word_docs(word, doc_id) and verify memories primary key index covers IN queries.
